shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch sitting peacefully with eyes closed in front of a screen showing a lake and a two-minute countdown timer, illustrating Calm's minimal MVP.
assets.caption: Hatch sitting peacefully with eyes closed in front of a screen showing a lake and a two-minute countdown timer, illustrating Calm's minimal MVP.
assets.prompt: Calm's Minimum Viable App | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting very still, eyes closed, in front of a simple glowing screen showing a calm lake scene and a countdown timer reading "2:00." The scene is peaceful and slightly humorous — a robot meditating. Cream background. HackProduct watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.prompt: Calm's Minimum Viable App | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing toward a chaotic floating cloud of app icons — productivity apps, social media, notification badges. The contrast between the noise and the idea of stillness is the point. Cream background, no speech bubble. HackProduct watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
